title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Finolex Cables Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Finolex Cables Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Finolex Cables Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Allahabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Finolex Cables Holdings Services:
Finolex Cables Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Cables Holdings Services!
